description: Switch build notes from card grid to a title-only list while keeping PRDs unchanged to improve visual distinction and scan-ability.

userStories.title: Render build notes as a list
userStories.description: As a reader, I want build notes in a list so I can scan them quickly and distinguish them from PRDs.
acceptanceCriteria: Build notes section renders as a vertical list instead of a card grid
List uses a clear treatment for scan-ability (bullets or subtle dividers)
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Click list item to open build note
userStories.description: As a reader, I want each build note list item to open the full build note.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking a list item navigates to the build note page
List item has a visible hover/active affordance (e.g., underline or background)
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: List item content is title-only
userStories.description: As a reader, I want concise list items so I can scan titles fast.
acceptanceCriteria: Each list item shows the build note title only (no date/excerpt)
Titles are readable and consistent with existing typography
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
